<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Shared\ValidationRulesFinders; use PhpParser\Node; /** * This class looks for * $anyVariable = Request::validate(...); * or just * Request::validate(...); * * Also supports `->validateWithBag('', ...)` */ class RequestValidateFacade { public static function find(Node $node) { if (!($node instanceof Node\Stmt\Expression)) return; $expr = $node->expr; if ($expr instanceof Node\Expr\Assign) { $expr = $expr->expr; // If it's an assignment, get the expression on the RHS } if ( $expr instanceof Node\Expr\StaticCall && $expr->class instanceof Node\Name && in_array($expr->class->name, ['Request', \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Request::class]) ) { if ($expr->name->name === "validate") { return $expr->args[0]->value; } if ($expr->name->name === "validateWithBag") { return $expr->args[1]->value; } } } }
